# CLAUDE PARAFLOW

This repository contains Claude Code global prompts for personal use in Paraflow Team.

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| commit | 提交代码、跟踪 PR 状态、完成代码合并 |
| issue | 明确需求，创建 Issue 跟踪需求进度 |
| moxt-gitea-clone |  |
| moxt-todo | 查找 MOXT 项目中分配给我的未完成 Jira 任务，按类型分组显示 |
